stdout:
**Acceptance Criteria**

No blocking findings. Inline and external plan content are both projected through `plan_doc` tests, and production validation now consumes resolved external content. `evaluate_graph_rules` resolves plan content before calling the pure graph engine at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:406). Scoped validation and transition enforcement also inject plan content at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:721) and [mod.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/mod.rs:644).

The prior repo-root bug is addressed: external `plan_doc_location` paths now resolve against `storage.root().parent()` at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:481), and file-backed regression tests prove `<repo>/.jit` storage reads `<repo>/dev/active/{id}-plan.md` at [scope_validation_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/scope_validation_tests.rs:540) and [scope_validation_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/scope_validation_tests.rs:591).

**Architecture / Separation Of Concerns**

No blocking findings. Filesystem I/O remains in the command boundary resolver: `load_plan_content` performs the read at [plan_doc.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan_doc.rs:186). The graph validation engine receives a `HashMap<String, String>` and uses injected content without filesystem access at [graph.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs:319) and [graph.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/validation/graph.rs:806).

**Functional Style**

No blocking findings. The resolver wiring uses iterator pipelines for filtering breakable issues and collecting content at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:484).

**Correctness / Invariants**

No blocking findings. This change does not introduce writes to issue state, event mutations, gate transitions, assignee/label parsing, PID handling, or unsafe code. The relevant correctness invariant for this issue is satisfied: missing external plan files surface as errors rather than silently validating, covered by [scope_validation_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/tests/scope_validation_tests.rs:481).

**Safety**

No unsafe code observed in the reviewed resolver and validation paths.

**Testing**

Provided evidence shows the latest `cargo-ci` run for commit `fc4ba3c` passed `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test --workspace`. I also ran `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`; it passed with allowed label warnings only.

Coverage now includes the prior review’s missing file-backed case via `JsonFileStorage` rooted at `<tmp>/.jit` with the external plan under `<tmp>/dev/active`.

**Error Handling**

No blocking findings. `PlanDocError::Read` includes the issue id and resolved path at [plan_doc.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan_doc.rs:68). Command wiring preserves this as a contextual `anyhow` error at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:495).

**CLI Contract**

No CLI command was added. Existing JSON behavior is unchanged.

**Documentation**

No blocking findings. Public resolver APIs include doc comments and examples, including `INLINE_LOCATION` at [plan_doc.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/plan_doc.rs:32) and `resolve_plan_content` at [validate.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/crates/jit/src/commands/validate.rs:420).

**Prior Review Feedback**

Addressed. The first review’s “resolver is unwired” finding is fixed by injecting `plan_content` into graph evaluation. The second review’s `.jit` versus repo-root bug is fixed by deriving the base directory from the parent of `.jit` and by adding the file-backed regression.

**Jit Issue Management**

Dependency `c78168d8` is marked done. `./scripts/jit-validate.sh` passed with label warnings only.

VERDICT: PASS
---
Gate result: PASSED
